channel.title: Qt5 on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Qt5 on Arrans github.io

item.title: pawelsalawa/sqlitestudio
item.description: A free, open source, multi-platform SQLite database manager.

item.title: pbek/QOwnNotes
item.description: QOwnNotes is a plain-text file notepad and todo-list manager with Markdown support and Nextcloud / ownCloud integration.

item.title: ikskuh/kristall
item.description: Graphical small-internet client for windows, linux, MacOS X and BSDs. Supports gemini, http, https, gopher, finger.

item.title: yeahitsjan/pawxel
item.description: Lightweight screenshot tool for designers & developers
